h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but inferred as larger serif bold centered text.

h2.visual_description: Centered, serif font, larger than body text, significant whitespace above and below.

h3.visual_description: Not present in sample; likely flush-left bold serif.

visual_matchers.pattern: Bar chart with dual-color coding (Olive/Brown) and horizontal grid lines

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Date parenthetical style (e.g., Cook et al. 2001; Beard et al. 2011)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number followed by vertical pipe and chapter/section title at the bottom left (e.g., '226 | Recreational Fishing and Keep Fish Wet')
